description: Default blocked command patterns for PreToolUse hook. Configure via hooks.allow in shirokuma-docs.config.yaml. Note: gh api commands are intentionally excluded due to high path variability making pattern matching impractical.

rules.reason: PR merge requires explicit user approval. Ask the user before merging.
Force push requires explicit user approval. This can overwrite remote history.
Hard reset requires explicit user approval. This discards all uncommitted changes.
Discarding all working tree changes requires explicit user approval.
Deleting untracked files requires explicit user approval.
Force deleting a branch requires explicit user approval.
Use `shirokuma-docs items list` instead of `gh issue list`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items pull <number>` instead of `gh issue view`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items add issue` instead of `gh issue create`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items add comment <number> --file <file>` instead of `gh issue comment`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items push <number>` instead of `gh issue edit`. Edit the cached frontmatter and push.
Use `shirokuma-docs items close <number>` instead of `gh issue close`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items reopen <number>` instead of `gh issue reopen`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items remove <number>` instead of `gh issue delete`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items pr create` instead of `gh pr create`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items pr show` instead of `gh pr view`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items pr list` instead of `gh pr list`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items pr comments`, `items pr reply`, `items pr resolve` instead of `gh pr review`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items pr reply` for review comments, or `shirokuma-docs items add comment` for general comments instead of `gh pr comment`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items pr close` instead of `gh pr close`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items pr edit <number> --base <branch>` instead of `gh pr edit`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items reopen <number>` instead of `gh pr reopen`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items list` or `items fields` instead of `gh project`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items search` instead of `gh search issues`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items search --type pr` instead of `gh search prs`.
